smaller wheelie bin - ours is too big
ContactUs.ENUM_StreetCleaning: A dead animal in the street
Needles or drugs in the street
ContactUs.ENUM_PavementRoadRepair: Report potholes or a damaged road
GardenWaste.ENUM_EventType: Renewal letter failed to send to customer
Renewal letter failed to send to occupant
GardenWaste.ENUM_CardOrCheque_YesNo: No, they will pay by cheque
ContactUs.ENUM_CommercialCharity: Ask for a commercial waste bin
Ask for a commercial waste sack
Find out where to get rid of unwanted charity items
GardenWaste.ENUM_relationship: You're a relative or friend of someone who lives there
You live there, but your payment card is registered elsewhere
ContactUs.ENUM_GulliesDrains: Ask us to clean or unblock a gully or drain
ContactUs.ENUM_Parks: Report flytipping, littering or graffiti in a park
Report a full rubbish bin in a park
Report dog mess in a park
Report an overgrown tree or shrub in a park
Report needles or drugs in a park
Ask us to remove weeds from a park
ContactUs.ENUM_Volunteering: Find out about volunteering for litter picking

MyBins.ENUM_incompleteReason: Customer refuses to give up bin
ContactUs.ENUM_HouseholdBins: Report an address for leaving their bins out

Report a missing bin or black box

MyBins.ENUM_RequestSubType2: my bin or box is damaged
my bin or box has gone missing
ContactUs.ENUM_CommunalBins: Report that a communal bin has been moved
Report people putting items in the wrong bin
Ask for a new sign on a rubbish or recycling bin
ContactUs.ENUM_OutdoorEvents: Ask for bins for an outdoor event
Ask for waste collection for an outdoor event
ContactUs.ENUM_TreesBranchesWeeds: Report overhanging branches, trees or bushes
Ask us to remove weeds from a park
